name: Eggnog Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, cream butter with 3/4 cup of sugar until fluffy.
3. Separate eggs; add yolks to the butter and beat well.
4. Blend orange juice with 1/4 cup rum, orange peel, and vanilla extract.
5. Add the orange juice mixture to the butter, alternating additions with the reserved flour mixture.
6. Beat egg whites in a separate bowl until soft peaks form.
7. Gradually beat in the remaining 1/4 cup sugar into the egg whites until stiff but not dry.
8. Fold the whipped egg whites into the batter.
9. Turn the batter into two buttered 8-inch or 9-inch round cake pans lined on the bottom with wax paper.
10. Bake for 25 minutes or until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean.
11. Let cakes cool in pans for 5 minutes, then invert onto wire racks.
12. Peel off the paper liners and let cool thoroughly.
13. To assemble: Split each layer horizontally with a long slicing knife.
14. Sprinkle each of the four layers with 2 tablespoons of rum.
15. Spread Eggnog Cream Filling between the layers as you stack them.
16. Frost the top and sides of the cake with Chocolate Bittersweet Frosting.
17. If desired, sprinkle chopped walnuts around the side of the cake.
18. Makes 1 four-layer cake.
